notes: Captures the dual-view layout and overall shape of the input photo but linework reads as noisy edge-trace rather than clean FAO plate ink, with simplified arms lacking sucker rings.
specific_issues: broken/jittery silhouette edges from photo-trace artifacts
arms and tentacles merge into blobs without distinct articulation
dorsal-view eye is a faint smudge rather than almond with pupil
stipple is scattered noise rather than chromatophore field concentration
small spurious bumps along mantle outline
tentacles not distinguished from shorter arms
fin-mantle junction has stray short strokes instead of a clean continuous curve
